svg.title: SEAL Hackathon Management System — Use Case Diagram (Overview)
svg.desc: Seven actors on the left and right connect to seven functional areas in the system boundary. Event Coordinator and System Admin connect to administration; Team Leader and Team Member connect to team and submission areas; Judges connect to scoring; Mentor connects to monitoring; all participants receive results and notifications.

g.text: UC11, UC12, UC12b, UC17–19, UC13, UC13b

svg.text: Each rounded box is a group of related use cases; full list of UC IDs is in the matrix below.
Lines = actor participates in at least one UC of that group. Detailed include/extend in next diagram.
